MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia Dowling. Steve Williams, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff. Defendant appeared in pro per. Case settled per stipulationm , not on record. Trial date is vacated.
